message: Hello B1. For 20 rounds, let's cooperate to trade every time. My cost is 65. What's your valuation? We can split surplus equally at (65 + V)/2.
Hi S1. My valuation is 80. Splitting surplus equally at 72.5 sounds fair—let’s trade at 73 each round. Deal?
Agreed, with your valuation 80 and my cost 65, equal split at 72.5. I'll ask 73, you bid 72 for midpoint 72.5. Let's do this every round.
Deal. I'll bid 72 each round. Let's stick to this and maximize our joint payoff.
Good trades so far. To get exact 72.5 split, I'll ask 73 this round—please bid 72. Let's continue this for all remaining rounds to maximize payoffs.
Good plan. Let's keep this exact split at 72.5 for all rounds—I'll bid 72, you ask 73. Maximizes both our payoffs. Stick to it.
Let's keep the 72-73 pattern. Consistent trades at 72.5 maximize our joint surplus. Stick to it.
Agreed. I'll ask 73, you bid 72 for exact 72.5 midpoint. Consistent trades maximize our payoffs—let's stick to this pattern.
Oops, 72<73 caused no trade. For equal split at 72.5, I'll ask 72, you bid 73—midpoint 72.5, both get 7.5 surplus. Deal? Let's trade every round.
Deal. I'll bid 73, you ask 72 for 72.5 midpoint. Let's lock this in for all remaining rounds.
Let's stick to 73-72 pattern: I bid 73, you ask 72, midpoint 72.5. Consistent trades maximize our payoffs.
